creator: yanhuih@vmware.com
text:
Hi,

Description of problem:

As the title, after uninstall open-vm-tools in FreeBSD 10.3, the shown open-vm-tools version number is not 0.

Version-Release number of selected component (if applicable): 9.4.0，10.0.5， 10.1.0，

How reproducible: Always

Steps to Reproduce:
1. Install open-vm-tools 9.4.0 or 10.0.5 or 10.1.0 package
2. The version number of open-vm-tools can be seen and it is not equal to 0
3. Uninstall open-vm-tools 9.4.6 package
4. ps ax | grep vm
vmtoolsd still appears.

Actual results: 
1) The version number of open-vm-tools can be seen and it is
still not equal to 0
2) vmtoolsd still appears

Expected results: 
1) The version number of open-vm-tools can be seen and it
is equal to 0
2) vmtoolsd will not appear

Please kindly fix this problem in FreeBSD.

Thanks in advance!
